title: The Heartwarming Experience of Watching Fireworks

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer! Check out that amusement park ad!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
"Get the scare of your life at our haunted
mansion!" That place looks gas! We've gotta go
check it out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No cap, I'm so curious about what they mean with
the whole "now with 300% more monsters" thing!
choice_data_list: It'll be something, that's for sure...

text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: Horde of Zombies
text_block_list.text: Rwaaahhh! Braaains... BRAAAIIINSSS!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Did they seriously mob us with a horde of
zombies right off the bat?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's get outta here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! That was, like, the best! There were so
many zombies at the end, it was like being
squashed on the morning rush hour train!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Since we've gone through hell, how about we
see what paradise is like next? Everyone online's
been obsessed about this one ride!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's called "Heaven," and it's apparently the
scariest roller coaster in history! Even the heiress
of a big-name company gave it two thumbs up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clack, clack, clack, clack, clack...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! We're so high up! The view is total fire!
choice_data_list: Yeah, that's great, but here comes the drop!
Yeah, that's great, but here comes the drop!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! True... We're almost at the top now... Here
we go... Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO! AWESOOOME!
choice_data_list: I'm too young to go to heaveeen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, I gotta get souvenirs for my squad, my
classmates, and some of the younger students...
Oh, I should get something for the academy's
staff, too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Man, I have way too many people to get gifts for!
I don't even know if I can carry them all back with
me!
choice_data_list: I can help carry stuff for you!
I can help carry stuff for you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you being for real?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I'll take you up on that, then. Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we get matching souvenirs while
we're at it? We came here together, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and I explore the park until it gets
dark.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, we made it! We're sure to get a clear
view of the fireworks from here!
choice_data_list: This spot sure is tucked out of the way.
This spot sure is tucked out of the way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it just? I heard about this secret spot online!
Getting here was a real pain, but we've got this
whole area to ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Peeeeew... BANG!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That was, like, right over us! Aw, it's a heart! It's
so close too! Doesn't it feel like you could just
reach up and grab it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... This is seriously so lit! Nothing beats fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whaddya think? Are you feeling the vibes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I knew you'd enjoy yourself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, last time we hung out, you said nothing
made you happier than seeing me enjoy myself,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
When you said that, it reminded me of the time I
ran my second tryout.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And thanks, Trainer, for giving me that push I
needed. And from here on I just gotta keep...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Raisin' the roof and stuff! Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You've always been there for me, ever since the
beginning. You're the best partner anyone could
ask for.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You mean a lot to me, so I didn't want to be a
burden to you. But I was wrong when I assumed
you'd find me too much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The reality is, you respect my wild and excited
self just the way I am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's why you always let me have my way.
choice_data_list: I'm lucky to be your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, okay, but like! I'm usually the one giving other people support and stuff, so it's weird being the one getting so much support!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm not used to having someone to lean on, so
this whole situation's thrown me for a loop or
three!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But yeah. Thanks. Thanks for being there for me.
I'm so glad we met!
choice_data_list: You can lean on me even more, you know.

Let's keep it up and continue being there for
each other!
I should be the one thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oop, now you've said it! No take-backs, though!
You'd better not regret it when I send you running
errands for me left and right!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ooh, you know what?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You should tell me about your troubles too
whenever something is weighing on your mind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You're always so considerate of my feelings, so I
wanna be just as considerate to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is positively beaming at me. I swear
then and there to continue being her strongest
pillar of strength and support.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Heck yeah, I'm on board with that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's something special about knowing
someone always has your back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You can count on me whenever you need help
too, so don't hold back, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is positively beaming at me. I swear
then and there to continue being her strongest
pillar of strength and support.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't think I did anything worthy of
getting thanked for.
choice_data_list:
I'm just glad I get the privilege of seeing the
real you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Is that what you meant? But y'know, it's
thanks to you that I feel comfortable with being
so open.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's why I should be the one thanking you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But we'll never finish thanking each other at this
rate, so let's just call it even! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is positively beaming at me. I swear
then and there to continue being her strongest
pillar of strength and support.
